questionText: Disclose your organization's best available techniques as a percentage of Portland cement clinker production capacity.
questionKo: 공시 조직의 사용 가능 시멘트 생산 용량.
simpleHelp: The purpose of this question is to achieve a reasonable indication of the level of adoption of Best Available Techniques (BAT) in the sector. CDP recognizes that this should not be taken as a proxy for overall efficiency and productivity in an organization. Nonetheless, this information is useful in understanding the general adoption status of BAT in the organization and across the sector.

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select ‘Clinker Production' in 1.12
guidance.textKo: 이 문항 only appears 만약 귀사 선택 ‘Clinker Production' 1.12

guidance.text:
General 
Complete this table for each of the techniques in column 1.
These technologies apply to clinker production from cement kilns.
Total production capacity coverage (%) (column 2) 
Using this numerical field, enter the percentage of your total kiln capacity that utilizes the technique listed in column 1, using a value between 0-100, and no more than 2 decimal places.
All kiln capacity should be recognized, including kilns for which these technologies cannot be installed. For example, if your organization owns 5 Mt of wet kiln clinker capacity and 5 Mt of dry kiln clinker capacity, of which 50% has cyclone preheating of 4 or more stages, then you should enter 25 in the first row.
These two technologies are not mutually exclusive, i.e. the sum of both figures provided can be over 100.
guidance.textKo: 일반 완료 이 table each 의 techniques 열 1. 이 tech아니요logies apply clinker production 에서 시멘트 kilns. Total production capacity 범위 (%) (열 2) Using 이 숫자 입력, enter percentage 의 귀사의 total kiln capacity utilizes technique listed 열 1, using 가치 between 0-100, 및 아니요 more than 2 decimal places. 모든 kiln capacity 해야 합니다 recognized, 포함 kilns 이 tech아니요logies can아니요t inst모든ed. example, 만약 귀사 owns 5 Mt 의 wet kiln clinker capacity 및 5 Mt 의 dry kiln clinker capacity, 의 50% has cyclone preheating 의 4 또는 more stages, then 귀사 해야 합니다 enter 25 first 행. 이 two tech아니요logies 아니요t mutu모든y exclusive, i.e. sum 의 모두 수치 제공된 할 수 있습니다 over 100.

guidance.text: Further information on BAT for the cement sector can be found in EIPPCB's BAT Reference Document for the Production of Cement, Lime and Magnesium Oxide and from the European Cement Research Academy for Cement Sustainability Initiative .
guidance.textKo: Further 정보 BAT 시멘트 섹터 할 수 있습니다 found EIPPCB's BAT Reference Document Production 의 시멘트, Lime 및 Magnesium Oxide 및 에서 European 시멘트 Research Academy 시멘트 Sustainability Initiative.

guidance.text: Best available technique (BAT): Best available technique (BAT) refers to the available techniques which are the best for preventing or minimizing emissions and impacts on the environment. BAT include both the technology used, and the way your installation is designed, built, maintained, operated and decommissioned.
guidance.textKo: Best 사용 가능 technique (BAT): Best 사용 가능 technique (BAT) refers 사용 가능 techniques best preventing 또는 minimizing 배출량 및 영향 environment. BAT include 모두 기술 used, 및 way 귀사의 inst모든ation designed, built, maintained, operated 및 decommissioned.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 점 부여됨 per 완료 셀 proportion 숫자 입력 의 셀 displayed. 이 문항에서 최대 4/4점을 받을 수 있습니다.
